headline: Airbus to Supply H125 Helicopters to US Customs and Border Protection
summary: EADSY wins a contract to supply 10 H125 helicopters to U.S. Customs and Border Protection Air and Marine Operations.

raw.headline: Airbus to Supply H125 Helicopters to US Customs and Border Protection
raw.summary: EADSY wins a contract to supply 10 H125 helicopters to U.S. Customs and Border Protection Air and Marine Operations.

headline: Is BAE Systems Expanding Its Presence in the Armored Vehicle Market?
summary: BAESY is expanding its armored vehicle footprint with the AMPV and proven combat platforms as militaries modernize aging fleets.

raw.headline: Is BAE Systems Expanding Its Presence in the Armored Vehicle Market?
raw.summary: BAESY is expanding its armored vehicle footprint with the AMPV and proven combat platforms as militaries modernize aging fleets.
